events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. The key issue is sequence control: confined-space entry work observed after a hold point needs documented prerequisite completion and authorization under OSHA 1910.146 before it can proceed.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.tmp <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"in-progress\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 50,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.86,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [\"prerequisite-hold-point-signoff\", \"confined-space-entry-authorization\", \"in-progress-confined-space-work\"],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Confined space work is actively in progress after a hold point, but the earlier prerequisite step is not shown.\",
    \"No signoff page or documented authorization is attached to verify the hold point was released before entry/work proceeded.\",
    \"Sequence cannot demonstrate required permit-space evaluation, controls, and authorized entry documentation before work began.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop confined-space entry/work until the missing prerequisite documentation and hold-point release are verified.\",
    \"Confirm permit-required confined space classification, entry permit, atmospheric testing, isolation/LOTO, ventilation, attendant, entrant, supervisor, and rescue provisions are complete and current.\",
    \"Attach the signoff/permit page and re-inspect sequence compliance before allowing work to continue.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed work is in progress beyond a documented hold point, but the required earlier prerequisite and signoff are absent. For confined space work, proceeding without verifiable pre-entry authorization and controls is a sequence violation and must be treated as non-compliant until proven otherwise.\",
  \"references\": [\"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146 - Permit-required confined spaces\"]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.tmp /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
→ /app
